THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOWDER, MICHAEL COX, MICHAEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 72 DORLAND ST, S.F, CA. $2,481.32 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,481.32, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFENDANTS MAY MOVE FOR A MODIFICATION OF JUDGMENT REDUCING ITEM 1 ON LINE 7 UPON A SHOWING THAT DEFENDANTS VACATED THE PREMISES BEFORE NOVEMBER 30, 1999
